arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops HUGE Man Utd transfer hint
arts.sum: Amorim’s desperation for a new striker was seen in a new light with his team selection for Man Utd’s Premier League clash against Crystal Palace on Sunday. When asked why Mainoo was selected ahead of Hojlund and Zirkzee against Crystal Palace, Amorim told reporters: “It's more understanding the opponent, understanding our team, what we feel that is missing in this moment.

arts.ttl: Man United pay tribute to 1958 Munich Air Disaster victims ahead of clash with Crystal Palace... as stars wear black armbands
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim and Oliver Glasner both led their respective teams out and laid flowers on the ground minutes before the game, with supporters having held a fan-led service outside Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign Lecce defender Dorgu for £25m
arts.sum: Manchester United sign Denmark defender Patrick Dorgu from Lecce on a five-and-a-half-year deal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm Patrick Dorgu shirt number
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu showed off his new shirt number to Man Utd's Old Trafford crowd on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports Share Update on Tottenham Move to Sign Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Spurs are not expected to make a move for the 20-year-old before the transfer window slams shut.

arts.ttl: Leon Bailey, Christopher Nkunku, Mathys Tel: Manchester United’s search for an attacker
arts.sum: After the signing of Patrick Dorgu, Manchester United hope to strengthen their attack before Monday’s deadline. As reported by Sky Germany’s Florian Plettenberg, the Premier League side held talks this…

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo is deployed as a STRIKER for Man United - as Ruben Amorim explains bizarre tactical switch for Crystal Palace clash
arts.sum: Many eyebrows were raised when the Manchester United starting XI was announced for Sunday's clash with Crystal Palace with Kobbie Mainoo apparently being played up top.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford undergoing medical ahead of Aston Villa loan move
arts.sum: The 27-year-old forward’s future has dominated headlines throughout the transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends brutal message to Marcus Rashford ahead of Man United exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s exit from Manchester United was inevitable the moment he was dropped from the squad by manager Ruben Amorim. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Deal for Chilwell 'Could Happen Before Deadline'
arts.sum: Crystal Palace may succeed in wrapping up a deal for Chelsea's Ben Chilwell ahead of the transfer window slamming shut
